title: Letter LXXIII.

source.title: NPNF2-07. Cyril of Jerusalem, Gregory Nazianzen

verses.text: As to the subject of your letter, these are my sentiments.
I am not angry at being overlooked, but I am glad when I am honoured.
The one is my own desert, the other is a proof of your respect.
Excuse this short letter, for anyhow, though it is short, it is longer than silence.
